title: abutilon × luteum-erectum
intro: Abutilon × luteum-erectum, also known as the Yellow-flowering Abutilon, is a hybrid plant species within the Malvaceae family. It is a flowering plant with bright yellow flowers, often grown as an ornamental in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been reported to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids. In herbal preparations, Abutilon × luteum-erectum is often used to treat various health issues, such as skin problems and respiratory infections, and is typically consumed as a tea or tincture.
